title: Blossom Haven
description: Making Minecraft more peaceful and adventurous
body:
![backgroundfinal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a37da6ef8c7deaf5097af3d9b12e0edf039b886.png)

## **ABOUT:**
**Welcome to Blossom Haven**:\
Blossom Haven introduces unique features to the game to make it more relaxing and calming for you to play. You can unwind and play some Minecraft while having a lovely experience. It removes most competitive features that make Minecraft more stressful and not as relaxing.\
I additionally introduce fun mechanics to the game that makes it more interesting. It adds some features that remove some annoying mechanics that Minecraft already had and adds some QOL things.
